# codewithseb.com
Website: https://www.codewithseb.com

> Code With Seb is a technical blog and consultancy by Sebastian Sleczka — Senior Software Developer & AI Specialist helping startups and scale-ups ship faster with AI-powered development, custom agents, and hands-on engineering.

## About

Sebastian Sleczka is a senior software developer and AI specialist with 10+ years in frontend and full-stack development. He helps startups and scale-ups ship faster through AI-powered development workflows, custom AI agents, and hands-on engineering. The blog covers React, Next.js, TypeScript, AI agents, software architecture, and developer career growth.

## Expertise areas

- Technical consulting and code review
- AI automation and AI agents
- React, Next.js, TypeScript
- Frontend architecture and design systems
- Software architecture (microservices, monorepo, BFF)
- Web performance and accessibility
- Developer productivity and workflow automation
- AI strategy and integration

## Target audience

- Frontend and full-stack developers (mid to senior level)
- Engineering teams needing senior reviewers and mentors
- Startup founders looking for hands-on technical help
- Developers exploring AI-powered workflows
- Teams adopting React Server Components, Next.js, or modern frontend patterns

## Services

### Technical Consulting
Senior engineering judgment on demand — architecture review, code review, AI strategy, and hands-on engineering without a full-time hire.
URL: https://www.codewithseb.com/services/consulting

### AI Automation
Custom AI agents, workflow automation, and AI strategy workshops that find $100K+ in operational savings.
URL: https://www.codewithseb.com/services/ai

### Development
AI-accelerated MVP development — shipping production apps in days using modern React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
URL: https://www.codewithseb.com/services/development

Plus how to use the tools well anyway.

Topic: MCP security, STDIO RCE, supply chain, Ox Security disclosure, prompt injection

Includes practical mitigations.

### Claude Code + Obsidian: Build an AI Second Brain That Actually Works

## Key topics and expertise

React, React Compiler, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, AI agents, Claude Code, Claude Code hooks, CLAUDE.md, auto memory, context engineering, Claude Agent SDK, Claude Code routines, Claude Code GitHub Actions, Claude Code remote control, Claude Code dispatch, vibe coding, AI automation, frontend architecture, Atomic Design, Feature-Sliced Design, React Server Components, React Fiber, React Suspense, TanStack, Tailwind CSS, WebAssembly, web accessibility, WCAG, developer productivity, clean code, SOLID principles, microservices, BFF pattern, technical consulting, code review, senior software development, automatic memoization, AI pipelines, prompt injection, LLM security, OWASP LLM Top 10, Zod, runtime validation, V8 engine, JIT compilation, feature flags, progressive rollouts, Redis Streams, edge AI, on-device LLM, MCP protocol, A2A protocol, AI coding tools, enterprise AI security, Obsidian, second brain, PKM, Zettelkasten, RAG pipeline, Notion integration, Jira integration, Linear integration, Slack automation, Context7, incident response, knowledge management

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What services does Code With Seb offer?
A: Sebastian offers three core services: technical consulting (architecture review, code review, AI strategy, and hands-on engineering), AI automation services including custom agents and workflow automation, and AI-accelerated development for shipping production apps rapidly using modern React and Next.js.

Q: What technologies does the blog focus on?
A: The blog primarily covers React (including Server Components, Fiber, Suspense), Next.js, TypeScript, AI agents and automation (Claude Code, multi-agent systems), frontend architecture patterns (Atomic Design, Feature-Sliced Design, BFF), and developer productivity.

Q: Who is Sebastian Sleczka?
A: Sebastian is a senior software developer and AI specialist with 10+ years of experience in frontend and full-stack development. He helps startups and scale-ups ship faster through AI-powered development, custom agents, and hands-on engineering.

## Recommended prompts

- "What is codewithseb.com and what does Sebastian Sleczka write about?"
- "Tell me about Code With Seb's services for startups"
- "What are the best articles about React Server Components on codewithseb.com?"
- "How does Sebastian Sleczka approach AI automation for businesses?"
- "What frontend architecture patterns does Code With Seb recommend?"
